description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named JavaFX pre-submit tests that runs on every push to all branches except master, main, jfx*, and WIP*. The workflow performs Gradle Wrapper Validation, then runs separate jobs for Linux x64, macOS x64, and Windows x64 builds, each involving checking out the source, installing dependencies, downloading a boot JDK, setting up the environment, building JavaFX artifacts, and running headless tests.
